name: Path Equivalence: 'file...name' (Multiple Internal Dot)
description: The product does not properly handle paths containing multiple consecutive internal dots, which some platforms resolve differently from single dots, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with multiple consecutive internal dots that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't canonicalize multi-dot sequences before comparison, while the OS resolves them differently at STORAGE[file_access]
